TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kingal lnglungan na knklaan krkari ka gaya nkari. Huwa ta kesun smalu ka kari we, dungus bale ka knklaan nii. So ka psuupu ta duma kari biciq, bobo na de, mgkari puto ka kari biciq nii. Psuupu ta duma kari puto dungan, mgkari qnedis ka kari puto nii. Kesun daha knklaan gaya nkari we, knklaan swaye na knklaan krkari pskadi gaya nkari. Dungus mhiti bale we, sndiyan gaya nkari quri kana kari bale bobo dheran nii. Niqan duma knklaan pnswayan na knklaan krkari, so ka knklaan hengak , knklaan gaya hengak , knklaan tmkari biciq , knklaan gaya nkari , knklaan dungus nkari , ma knklaan skari .
S.PHON: kiŇčal lŇčluŇčan na knklaan k…ĺka…ĺi ka gaja nka…ĺi. ńßuwa ta k…ôsun smalu ka ka…ĺi w…ô, duŇčus bal…ô ka knklaan nii. so ka psuupu ta duma ka…ĺi bi ¶iq, bobo na d…ô, mgka…ĺi puto ka ka…ĺi bi ¶iq nii. psuupu ta duma ka…ĺi puto duŇčan, mgka…ĺi qn…ôdis ka ka…ĺi puto nii. k…ôsun dańßa knklaan gaja nka…ĺi w…ô, knklaan swaj…ô na knklaan k…ĺka…ĺi pskadi gaja nka…ĺi. duŇčus mńßiti bal…ô w…ô, sndijan gaja nka…ĺi qu…ĺi kana ka…ĺi bal…ô bobo dńß…ô…ĺan nii. niqan duma knklaan pnswajan na knklaan k…ĺka…ĺi, so ka knklaan ńß…ôŇčak , knklaan gaja ńß…ôŇčak , knklaan tmka…ĺi bi ¶iq , knklaan gaja nka…ĺi , knklaan duŇčus nka…ĺi , ma knklaan ska…ĺi .
S.FORM: Kingal lnglungan na knklaan krkari ka gaya nkari. Huwa ta kesun smalu ka kari we, dungus bale ka knklaan nii. So ka psuupu ta duma kari biciq, bobo na de, mgkari puto ka kari biciq nii. Psuupu ta duma kari puto dungan, mgkari qnedis ka kari puto nii. Kesun daha knklaan gaya nkari we, knklaan swaye na knklaan krkari pskadi gaya nkari. Dungus mhiti bale we, sndiyan gaya nkari quri kana kari bale bobo dheran nii. Niqan duma knklaan pnswayan na knklaan krkari, so ka knklaan hengak , knklaan gaya hengak , knklaan tmkari biciq , knklaan gaya nkari , knklaan dungus nkari , ma knklaan skari .
S.PHON: kiŇčal lŇčluŇčan na knklaan k…ĺka…ĺi ka gaja nka…ĺi. ńßuwa ta k…ôsun smalu ka ka…ĺi w…ô, duŇčus bal…ô ka knklaan nii. so ka psuupu ta duma ka…ĺi bi ¶iq, bobo na d…ô, mgka…ĺi puto ka ka…ĺi bi ¶iq nii. psuupu ta duma ka…ĺi puto duŇčan, mgka…ĺi qn…ôdis ka ka…ĺi puto nii. k…ôsun dańßa knklaan gaja nka…ĺi w…ô, knklaan swaj…ô na knklaan k…ĺka…ĺi pskadi gaja nka…ĺi. duŇčus mńßiti bal…ô w…ô, sndijan gaja nka…ĺi qu…ĺi kana ka…ĺi bal…ô bobo dńß…ô…ĺan nii. niqan duma knklaan pnswajan na knklaan k…ĺka…ĺi, so ka knklaan ńß…ôŇčak , knklaan gaja ńß…ôŇčak , knklaan tmka…ĺi bi ¶iq , knklaan gaja nka…ĺi , knklaan duŇčus nka…ĺi , ma knklaan ska…ĺi .
